# CAT-G-001 — New to R&D Grant

| Field | Value |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Funder** | MBIE Innovation Services |
| **Status** | **OPEN** (verified 2026-07-13) |
| **URL** | https://www.business.govt.nz/tax-and-money/innovation-funding/new-to-r-and-d-grant |
| **Portal** | https://grantsportal.business.govt.nz |
| **Support** | https://funds.business.govt.nz/customer-support/ |
| **Amount** | **40%** of eligible R&D costs, max **$400,000** (on up to $1m eligible costs) |
| **Duration** | Up to **2 years** |
| **Co-fund** | Applicant **60%** — **cannot** be other NZ government/public funds |
| **Fit score** | **92** — flagship deeptech entry for CAT |

## Why it fits CAT

Sovereign edge stack R&D (multi-modal offline inference, local RAG, Hailo-10H vision, agentic computer use) is classic **scientific/technological uncertainty**. Capability development maps to IP, regulatory/compliance (Privacy Act + Te Mana Raraunga), project management, and information management.

## Eligibility snapshot

Entity: NZ company, limited partnership, or Māori incorporation/trust managing Māori assets under multiple ownership.

Must:

- Be **new to R&D** (&lt;$150k R&D spend last 3 years)
- &lt;$5k government R&D funding last 3 years
- Financially able to fund 60%
- Intend ongoing R&D

Cannot: sole traders, most ordinary trusts, foreign-incorporated companies, Crown-controlled entities, etc. (see official page).

## Capability skills (pick ≥2; ≥5% of project cost)

1. Understanding customers  
2. Intellectual property  
3. Regulatory and compliance ← **strong CAT fit**  
4. Lean R&D  
5. Project management  
6. Information management ← **strong CAT fit** (edge data sovereignty)

Plus mandatory intro session with **RDTI** team.

## Suggested CAT project framing

**Title (draft):** *Sovereign Edge AI Runtime — offline multi-modal inference and multi-tenant RAG for NZ primary industries*

**Uncertainty:** Reliable real-time vision+sensor fusion and local agent orchestration under intermittent connectivity without cloud LLM offload, while enforcing Te Mana Raraunga residency.

**Work packages:**

1. Core SecurityGuard + telemetry flywheel optimisations on RPi 5 16GB + Hailo-10H  
2. Weaver offline RAG evaluation (latency, isolation, explainability)  
3. Domain pilot (SoilGuard or Sting-Operation) field validation  
4. Capability: compliance mapping + IP + information management  

## Next steps

1. Contact Innovation Services **before** writing full application  
2. Confirm R&D spend history with finance  
3. Build 12-month cashflow + co-fund evidence  
4. Agent: draft narrative via grants-agent → HITL  
5. Submit via grants portal
